title: Kelka backpack's
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a34506cdfb54f56e0b840e279cadecd05114c36f.png)

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e92c50fe9d6d8f95d641934b82b6007827df17_0.webp)
### Adds backpacks that can be improved, thereby increasing the space in your inventory. _It also adds achievements._
![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e92c50fe9d6d8f95d641934b82b6007827df17_0.webp)
### 
## Types of backpacks:
## 1. Classic - has the inventory of a regular chest
## 2. Copper - has 9 more slots than the classic one
## 3. Iron - has a double chest inventory
## 4. Golden - it has 80 slots
## 5. Diamond - it has 96 slots
## 6. Netherite - it has the largest inventory expansion of 144 slots.
![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e92c50fe9d6d8f95d641934b82b6007827df17_0.webp)

![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/133ea3c76744e9382319398379fd9017d127abf1.png)
